planning_detail.runtime_contract: reuse iteration4_runtime_contract_v2 and retain max-safe batch size

policy.summary: Instantiate the full-scale espd path after phase-1 promotion, using fresh task ids, a dedicated full_scale_espd_v1 setup/arms bundle, and one experiment per GPU.
forbidden_moves: reuse pilot task ids that already have remote DONE markers
mix pilot and full-scale arm outputs in the same bundle
change backend or compile settings away from the retained runtime contract
claim full-scale success without comparing against RAND-84, CARD-84, and fixed-frontier

tasks.name: 冻结 ESPD full-scale setup
tasks.description: 复制 retained runtime contract，并从共享 GSM8K test split 生成 1319 样本 full manifest 到 full_scale_espd_v1/setup。

tasks.name: 运行 full GSM8K shared controls
tasks.description: 在 full_scale_espd_v1 bundle 中重跑 CARD-84 与 RAND-84，保持 retained runtime contract 和最大 batch。

tasks.name: 运行 cand_espd full GSM8K
tasks.description: 在 1319 样本 GSM8K full split 上运行 cand_espd，并记录 quality-at-equal-compute 与 speed-at-equal-quality-band。

tasks.name: 运行 ESPD fixed-frontier sham control
tasks.description: 在同一 full bundle 上运行 fixed-frontier 对照，检验速度收益是否真的来自 entropy routing。

tasks.name: 汇总 ESPD full-scale 证据包
tasks.description: 汇总 full GSM8K 的 candidate、shared controls 与 fixed-frontier 结果，输出供 result_debate 使用的 machine-readable bundle。
